app.infoPrefix: For more detailed information, visit the

card.demoDescription: Powerful laptop with Apple Silicon performance, a stunning Liquid Retina display, and all-day battery life.

errorPage.notFoundDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
errorPage.defaultDescription: An unexpected error occurred while loading this page.

installationPage.title: Installation
installationPage.description: Install Alixan UI in a Nuxt project. Components are copied directly into your app, so you own the source code and can customize it freely.

createProject.title: Create Project
createProject.description: Start with a Nuxt 4 project. If you already have one, you can skip this step.

addTailwind.title: Add Tailwind CSS
addTailwind.description: Alixan UI components use Tailwind CSS classes and CSS variables for the theme.

backdrop.middle: utility in your Tailwind CSS. Dialog, Drawer, Global Loader and mobile overlays use it for a consistent overlay color:

installComponent.title: Install Component
installComponent.description: Run the CLI from your project root. The component and required utilities will be copied into your project.
installComponent.createdSuffix: . Nuxt auto-import handles the component after it is copied.

useComponent.title: Use Component
useComponent.description: Use the component directly in your Vue templates. No package import is required for the component itself.

addI18n.title: Add i18n
addI18n.description: Alixan UI works best with Nuxt i18n because documentation labels, table headings and page meta use translation keys. Set missingWarn to false if your app also passes plain values through $t.

i18nConfiguration.title: Configuration
i18nConfiguration.infoLink: Read the i18n guide for details.

homePage.metaDescription: A modern UI component system for Nuxt 4, Vue 3 and TypeScript.
homePage.title: Alixan UI components for Nuxt.
homePage.description: This site is the documentation home for Alixan UI: a clean, minimal and production-ready component system built for Nuxt apps.

copied.title: Copied to your app
copied.description: The CLI installs component source files directly into your Nuxt project.

production.title: Production-ready
production.description: Components are typed, accessible and designed around a consistent visual language.

customize.title: Easy to customize
customize.description: No heavy abstractions. Tailwind classes and CSS variables stay close to the component.

button.description: Displays a button for actions in forms, toolbars and navigation.
button.usageDescription: Button styling is built from two independent props: variant chooses the visual weight, and color chooses the action intent. Combine them to get the right emphasis without changing the meaning of the action.
button.loadingDescription: Button does not include a built-in spinner state. If the button keeps spinning inline, the user can still navigate away and lose the action context. A global loader blocks the surface, communicates one active operation, and keeps the experience easier to understand.
button.disabledDescription: Prefer not to disable buttons. Keep the action visible and active, then explain why it cannot run with a warning message. This gives the user feedback instead of a dead control.
button.exportUnavailable: Export will be available after the report is generated.

iconButton.description: Displays an icon-only button for compact actions.
iconButton.usageDescription: IconButton uses the same variant and color system as Button, but keeps the control square for icon-only actions.
iconButton.loadingDescription: IconButton does not include an inline spinner. Inline loading can leave the user free to navigate away and lose the action context. Use a global loader when the operation should be treated as one blocking action.
iconButton.disabledDescription: Do not make the icon action silent and unavailable. Keep it active, then show a warning dialog that explains what the user needs to do.
iconButton.exportUnavailable: Export will be available after the report is generated.

textLink.description: An inline content link for documentation copy, hints and external references without button padding or background styles.

tooltip.description: Displays a small adaptive popover below the trigger, or above it when there is not enough space.

chip.description: A compact interactive token for filters, selections and removable metadata.

accordion.description: A vertical disclosure component for grouped content, inspired by shadcn-vue and adapted for Nuxt auto-import.

demo.accessibleContent: Yes. The trigger uses a native button and exposes aria-expanded for screen readers.
demo.styledContent: Yes. It follows the same clean spacing, rounded corners and muted typography as Alixan UI.
demo.slotsContent: Yes. Use title and content slots when you need custom markup for each item.

tabs.description: A compact segmented navigation component for switching between views.

switch.description: A compact toggle control for boolean settings.

status.description: A soft Cupertino-inspired status pill for success, warning, info and error states.

spinner.description: A centered loading indicator that fills the available space by default.

card.description: A simple island card for product previews with image, content, price and action.

empty.description: A centered empty state for missing data, empty search results and error pages.

divider.description: A simple horizontal rule for separating groups of content.

table.description: A reusable data table with configurable columns and explicit row value mapping.

input.description: Displays a form input with a floating label, clean states and slots for leading or trailing icons.

otp.description: A small one-time password input inspired by shadcn-vue, simplified for Nuxt auto-import and direct output events.

checkbox.description: A circular iOS-style checkbox for boolean, single-value and multiple-value selection.

select.description: A floating label select with a teleported menu and click-catcher overlay.

search.description: A focused search field with built-in debounce, search icon and clear button.

autocomplete.description: A searchable select input with a teleported list and safe outside click catcher.

calendar.description: A readonly input-style calendar with month and year selects, arrows and quick range presets.

dialog.description: A teleported modal surface for focused decisions and forms.

alertDialog.description: A compact Cupertino-style message dialog for clear blocking feedback.

confirmDialog.description: A focused confirmation dialog with cancel and submit actions.

drawer.description: A teleported panel for secondary flows and mobile-friendly details.

dropdownMenu.description: A teleported popover surface with a slot trigger and fully custom content.

globalLoader.description: A full-screen loading overlay for blocking async flows.

toast.description: A lightweight notification stack for success, warning, error and info messages.

seoPage.metaDescription: SEO setup guide for Alixan UI documentation.
seoPage.title: SEO
seoPage.description: Configure shared site metadata, page-level SEO tags, favicon links, robots.txt and sitemap generation for a Nuxt project.

installation.title: Installation
installation.sitemapDescription: Install Nuxt Sitemap before adding sitemap options to nuxt.config.ts.
installation.seoCommandDescription: After copying, replace the example values in site.ts with your own domain, project name, default title, description and OG image.

pageMeta.title: Page Meta
pageMeta.description: centralizes title, description, Open Graph and Twitter tags. Pages only pass values that differ from defaults.
pageMeta.usageMiddle: in each page. If a field is omitted, the default from
pageMeta.translation: It uses useI18n().t internally, so page values can be translation keys while siteConfig defaults can stay plain strings when missingWarn is disabled.

iconKitchenRef.prefix: For favicon file generation, see the

robots.title: Robots
robots.descriptionSuffix: so crawlers can discover your sitemap. Replace the example domain with your production domain.

sitemap.title: Sitemap
sitemap.description: Sitemap helps search robots find available routes and understand which pages should be crawled.
sitemap.verify: After deployment, check that your sitemap is available from the URL used in robots.txt.

iconKitchenPage.title: IconKitchen
iconKitchenPage.description: Generate favicon files with IconKitchen and connect them to your Nuxt project.

generate.title: Generate Icons
generate.descriptionPrefix: Generate the icon set in IconKitchen, download the
generate.descriptionSuffix: and rename the downloaded folder from web to

lottiePage.title: Lottie
lottiePage.description: Use Lottie animations as lightweight media inside empty states, errors and other feedback surfaces.
lottiePage.installationDescription: Install the Nuxt Lottie module. The command adds the module to your project and installs the required package.
lottiePage.folderPreviewStart: Download animation JSON from Lottie and place it in
lottiePage.emptyDescription: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

svgLoaderPage.title: SVG Loader
svgLoaderPage.description: Use nuxt-svgo-loader when you want to load optimized SVG files as Nuxt components.
svgLoaderPage.installationDescription: Install the nuxt-svgo-loader module. The command adds the module to your Nuxt project.

fontsPage.title: Fonts
fontsPage.description: Alixan UI uses Geist for documentation, but components do not require a specific font. You can install any font and map it to Tailwind tokens.
fontsPage.installationDescription: Install the Nuxt Google Fonts module when you want fonts to be loaded through Nuxt.

iconsPage.title: Icons
iconsPage.description: Alixan UI examples use Lucide Icons, but the components accept regular slots, so you can use any icon library you like.
iconsPage.infoPrefix: Browse the full icon catalog in
iconsPage.installationDescription: Install Lucide Vue when you want to use the same icon package as the documentation examples.
iconsPage.otherLibrariesDescription: Use Nuxt MDI, custom SVG components, or any other icon source. If it renders inside a slot, it works.
iconsPage.mdiDescriptionPrefix: Nuxt MDI provides Material Design Icons as Nuxt components. See the

themePage.title: Theme
themePage.description: Configure dark mode with Nuxt Color Mode and CSS variables used by Alixan UI components.

i18nPage.title: i18n
i18nPage.description: Alixan UI uses the official Nuxt i18n module. The project keeps message keys typed, while locale switching and persistence are handled by the module.
i18nPage.installationDescription: Install the Nuxt i18n module, then register it in
i18nPage.setupDescriptionEnd: to keep the default language without a prefix and prefix all other locales.
i18nPage.vueI18nConfigDescription: Point vueI18n to the external config file and disable i18n warnings in
i18nPage.translationsDescriptionEnd: The file option maps each locale to its translation file.
i18nPage.localizedLinksDescriptionEnd: before passing them to Button, IconButton or NuxtLink. This keeps the current locale prefix when users navigate between pages.
i18nPage.pageMetaDescriptionStart: Pass page-level SEO translation keys to

apiReferenceDescriptions.accordionItems: Accordion sections rendered by the component.
apiReferenceDescriptions.accordionModelValue: Controlled open item value. Use an array with multiple mode.
apiReferenceDescriptions.accordionMultiple: Allows more than one item to stay open.
apiReferenceDescriptions.accordionCollapsible: Allows the active single item to be closed.
apiReferenceDescriptions.dialogDescription: Short explanation shown under the title.
apiReferenceDescriptions.optionalMediaComponent: Optional media component, for example Lottie, img, or an icon component.
apiReferenceDescriptions.mediaProps: Props passed to the media component.
apiReferenceDescriptions.closeCallback: Callback called before closing the dialog.
apiReferenceDescriptions.fallbackSlotText: Fallback text when the default slot is not used.
apiReferenceDescriptions.buttonSurfaceStyle: Surface style. Filled is used by default. Combine it with color for intent.
apiReferenceDescriptions.semanticIntent: Semantic intent. Works with every variant.
apiReferenceDescriptions.heightPaddingText: Controls height, padding and text size.
apiReferenceDescriptions.buttonNuxtLink: Renders the button as a NuxtLink when provided.
apiReferenceDescriptions.buttonNativeAnchor: Renders the button as a native anchor when provided.
apiReferenceDescriptions.anchorTarget: Anchor target. Works with href links.
apiReferenceDescriptions.checkboxMode: Single stores a boolean or one value. Multiple stores an array.
apiReferenceDescriptions.checkboxValue: Value used for single value mode or multiple array mode.
apiReferenceDescriptions.checkboxLabel: Optional label rendered next to the circular control.
apiReferenceDescriptions.chipType: Adds the select chevron or remove icon.
apiReferenceDescriptions.chipSize: Controls height, radius, padding and icon size.
apiReferenceDescriptions.chipSelected: Switches the chip into the active primary state.
apiReferenceDescriptions.cancelCallback: Callback called before closing from cancel.
apiReferenceDescriptions.submitCallback: Callback called before closing from submit.
apiReferenceDescriptions.dynamicComponentData: Data passed to the dynamic component.
apiReferenceDescriptions.drawerMaxHeight: Drawer max-height for top and bottom positions.
apiReferenceDescriptions.popoverPlacement: Preferred popover placement. It flips automatically when there is not enough space.
apiReferenceDescriptions.emptyMediaSlot: Optional media rendered above the title.
apiReferenceDescriptions.loaderLabel: Optional label displayed below the spinner.
apiReferenceDescriptions.iconButtonVariant: Visual style of the icon button. Ghost is used by default.
apiReferenceDescriptions.iconButtonSize: Controls square size and icon size.
apiReferenceDescriptions.iconButtonNuxtLink: Renders the icon button as a NuxtLink when provided.
apiReferenceDescriptions.iconButtonNativeAnchor: Renders the icon button as a native anchor when provided.
apiReferenceDescriptions.inputId: Custom id. Generated automatically when omitted.
apiReferenceDescriptions.inputAutocomplete: Controls the native browser autocomplete behavior.
apiReferenceDescriptions.inputRequired: Shows a localized required message after blur when the value is empty.
apiReferenceDescriptions.inputMin: Minimum text length validation shown after blur.
apiReferenceDescriptions.inputMax: Maximum text length validation shown after blur.
apiReferenceDescriptions.inputPattern: Native pattern string. The value must match the whole pattern after blur.
apiReferenceDescriptions.patternMessage: Validation message shown when pattern does not match.
apiReferenceDescriptions.inputMask: Digit mask where # is a digit.
apiReferenceDescriptions.inputHint: Helper text shown below the input.
apiReferenceDescriptions.inputError: Error message. Also switches the input into destructive state.
apiReferenceDescriptions.inputReadonly: Makes the input readable but not editable.
apiReferenceDescriptions.inputClearButton: Shows a clear button when the input has a value and no trailing slot.
apiReferenceDescriptions.otpLength: Number of OTP digits. Values are clamped between 4 and 8.
apiReferenceDescriptions.otpChange: Emitted on every OTP value change.
apiReferenceDescriptions.otpSubmit: Emitted when the OTP value reaches the selected length.
apiReferenceDescriptions.searchModelValue: Search input value used by v-model.
apiReferenceDescriptions.searchPlaceholder: Placeholder text inside the search field.
apiReferenceDescriptions.searchDebounce: Delay in milliseconds before emitting the search event.
apiReferenceDescriptions.searchAutofocus: Focuses the input when it is mounted.
apiReferenceDescriptions.tooltipText: Tooltip content. Values can be translation keys.
apiReferenceDescriptions.tooltipDelay: Delay in milliseconds before the tooltip opens.
apiReferenceDescriptions.tooltipTriggerSlot: Trigger element that opens the tooltip on hover or focus.
apiReferenceDescriptions.tooltipContentSlot: Custom tooltip content rendered instead of the text prop.
apiReferenceDescriptions.searchReadonly: Makes the field readable but not editable.
apiReferenceDescriptions.searchEvent: Emitted with a trimmed value after debounce.
apiReferenceDescriptions.clearEvent: Emitted when the clear button is clicked.
apiReferenceDescriptions.selectModelValue: Selected option value used by v-model.
apiReferenceDescriptions.selectPlaceholder: Text shown when no option is selected.
apiReferenceDescriptions.selectOptions: Options list with label, value and optional disabled.
apiReferenceDescriptions.selectTeleport: Teleports menu to body. Keep true for nested popovers; set false only when the menu must stay inside the local layout.
apiReferenceDescriptions.switchLabel: Optional label rendered next to the switch.
apiReferenceDescriptions.tableColumns: Column definitions with labels and explicit value mappers.
apiReferenceDescriptions.tableRows: Data rows rendered by the table.
apiReferenceDescriptions.tableColumnValue: Arrow function that returns the cell value from a row object.
apiReferenceDescriptions.tableMinWidth: Optional Tailwind class for horizontal overflow control.
apiReferenceDescriptions.tabsModelValue: Selected tab index used by v-model.
apiReferenceDescriptions.tabsFull: Makes the tabs container and every tab use full available width.
apiReferenceDescriptions.linkTarget: Anchor target. When set to _blank, rel is set to noopener noreferrer.
apiReferenceDescriptions.spinnerSize: Controls spinner diameter and border width.
apiReferenceDescriptions.cardImage: Image URL rendered at the top of the card.
apiReferenceDescriptions.cardImageAlt: Accessible alt text for the image.
apiReferenceDescriptions.cardPrice: Price text shown next to the action button.
apiReferenceDescriptions.cardButtonEvent: Emitted when the button is clicked.

Modern, minimal and production-ready UI: Modern, minimal and production-ready UI components for Nuxt 4, Vue 3 and TypeScript.
